questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in passive voice.
We can buy books online from Amazon.

options.text: Books were to be bought online from Amazon.
Books are bought online from Amazon.
Books can be bought online from Amazon.
Books could be bought online from Amazon.

questions.correct_option_text: Books can be bought online from Amazon.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. If there is no need to substitute it, select ‘No substitution required’.
Edward II is tragic than some other plays by the dramatist.

Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph.
a. Many fitness trainers encourage their clients to include these foods in their diet to build muscle.
b. Power foods can be included in your everyday diet in a variety of ways.
c. The secret to getting the most out of power foods is, of course, knowing how to cook them properly, buying seasonal produce and recognising your preferred flavour profile.
d. Power foods are high in nutrients such as fibre, potassium and minerals.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word.
The new Principal of the school is stern, yet he understands the needs of his subordinates.
